zh.lifeSummary: 當John Ham於1649年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 哈普爾時，他的父親Mathew Ham25歲，母親Sarah Cole29歲。他於1668年5月6日與Mary Heard在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 哈普爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和6個女兒的父母。他去世於1727年2月17日在他的家鄉享年78歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Ham于1649年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 哈普爾时，他的父亲Mathew Ham25岁，母亲Sarah Cole29岁。他于1668年5月6日与Mary Heard在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 哈普爾结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和6个女儿的父母。他去世于1727年2月17日在他的家乡享年78岁。

nameMeanings.name: Ham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Korean Young, Ok, Nam, Chul, Eun Hee, Eun Young, Hae Jung, Il Hwa.
English (mainly southwestern) and German: variant of   Hamm  .
Dutch: topographic name from ham ‘land in a river bend’, ‘enclosed meadow’, or a habitational name from any of several country houses and places called De(n) Ham. Compare Van Ham and Vanderham .

variants.name: Hamme
meanings: Flemish (Van Hamme): variant of Ham 2, particularly referring to Hamme, a place in East Flanders.
German and English: variant of   Hamm  .

variants.name: Hamm
meanings: English (London): topographic name for someone who lived at a place called from Middle English ham(me), hom(me) (Old English hamm), which meant ‘land in a river bend’, ‘land hemmed in by marshland’, ‘wet land hemmed in by higher ground’, ‘river meadow’, or ‘cultivated plot on the edge of woodland or moor’. The topographic term is found mainly in the South Midlands and southern England. There are many farmsteads with this name in Devon and Sussex, five more substantial settlements called Ham or Hamp in Somerset, as well as East and West Ham in Essex, and places called Ham in Gloucestershire, Hampshire, Kent, Surrey, and Wiltshire. This form of the surname is also comparatively frequent in Ireland.
German: topographic name for someone who lived on land in a river bend, Old High German ham (see 1 above).
German and Jewish (Ashkenazic): habitational name from any of numerous places called Hamm, mainly the city in Westphalia.

variants.name: Hahm
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Korean Sung, Yong, Byung, Chang, Dong, Hyun, Jae, Jee, Jong, Jong Hun, Jong Hyun, Moon Hee, Jung Suk, Sang, Seok, Seung, Soon, Sungtae, Taeyong.
German: metonymic occupational name for a sealer of weights and measures, from Middle High German hāme ‘(standard) measure’.

variants.name: Hams
meanings: English: variant of Ham with plural -s or post-medieval excrescent -s.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

en.lifeSummary: When John Ham was born in 1649, in New Hampshire, British Colonial America, his father, Mathew Ham, was 25 and his mother, Sarah Cole, was 29. He married Mary Heard on 6 May 1668, in New Hampshire, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 6 daughters. He died on 17 February 1727, in his hometown, at the age of 78.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Ham est né en 1649, à New Hampshire, Amérique coloniale britannique, son père, Mathew Ham, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Sarah Cole, avait 29 ans. Il a épousé Mary Heard le 6 mai 1668, à New Hampshire, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 6 filles. Il est décédé le 17 février 1727, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 78 ans.

Mai 1668 in New Hampshire, British Colonial America Mary Heard geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Er starb am 17. Februar 1727 im Alter von 78 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Ham è nato il nel 1649 nel New Hampshire, British Colonial America, il suo padre, Mathew Ham, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Sarah Cole, aveva 29 anni. Lui sposato Mary Heard il 6 maggio 1668, nel New Hampshire, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 6 figlie. Morì il 17 febbraio 1727, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 78 anni.

ja.Dover, Strffr, N-Hm: アメリカ合衆国ニューハンプシャー州ストラフォードドバー

ja.lifeSummary: John Hamが1649年にイギリス植民地アメリカニュー ハンプシュアイアで生まれた時，父Mathew Hamは25歳，母Sarah Coleは29歳であった。1668年5月6日にイギリス植民地アメリカニュー ハンプシュアイアでMary Heardと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼は1727年2月17日に故郷で78歳で死去した。

ko.Dover, Strafford, New Hampshire, British: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 뉴 함프실르 스트래퍼드 도버
ko.Dover, New Hampshire, British Colonial A: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 뉴 함프실르 도버

ko.Portsmouth, Rockingham, New Hampshire, B: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 뉴 함프실르 록잉함 포츠모우스
ko.Dover, Strafford, New Hampshire, Colonia: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 뉴 함프실르 스트래퍼드 도버
ko.Dover MM, Strafford, New Hampshire, Brit: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 뉴 함프실르 스트래퍼드 도버
ko.lifeSummary: John Ham(이)가 1649년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 뉴 함프실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Mathew Ham(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Sarah Cole(은)는 29세였다. 그는 1668년 5월 6일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 뉴 함프실르에서 Mary Heard(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1727년 2월 17일 그의 고향에서 78세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Ham nasceu em 1649, em New Hampshire, British Colonial America, seu pai, Mathew Ham, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Sarah Cole, tinha 29 anos. Ele casou-se com Mary Heard em 6 de maio de 1668, em New Hampshire, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 6 filhas. Ele faleceu em 17 de fevereiro de 1727, em sua cidade natal, com 78 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Ham родился в 1649 г. в местности ню хампшир, бритиш колоняль амирика, его отцу по имени Mathew Ham было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Sarah Cole, 29. Он женился на женщине по имени Mary Heard 6 мая 1668 г. в местности ню хампшир, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 6 дочерей. Он умер 17 февраля 1727 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 78 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Ham nació en 1649, en New Hampshire, British Colonial America, su papá, Mathew Ham, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Sarah Cole, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Mary Heard el 6 de mayo de 1668, en New Hampshire, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió el 17 de febrero de 1727, en su pueblo, a la edad de 78 años.
